title: Indium Phosphide (InP): The Second Bottleneck of AI Compute
title_zh: 磷化铟(InP):AI 算力的第二个瓶颈
subtitle: After HBM, the next physical chokepoint in AI scaling is the material that makes light
subtitle_zh: 继 HBM 之后,AI 扩张的下一个物理卡点,是负责「产生光」的材料
one_liner: Silicon does the compute and can route light, but cannot efficiently generate it. Indium phosphide does. No InP, no lasers, no hundred-thousand-GPU cluster — and the InP supply base was built for telecom, not for the AI demand curve it now faces.
one_liner_zh: 硅负责计算、也能调制和路由光,但几乎不能高效地产生光;磷化铟能。没有 InP 就没有激光,没有激光就没有十万卡集群——而 InP 的产能是按电信需求建的,扛不住如今的 AI 需求曲线。

sources.title: Nvidia's $4B Photonics Venture: What You Need to Know
NVIDIA's $4B Optics Bet Signals Photonics as AI's Next Bottleneck
Indium Phosphide: the second AI bottleneck after HBM (industry note)
sources.publisher: W. Smolinski / OFC 2026 disclosures, McKinsey networking optics

sources.title: AXT: The Indium Phosphide Play for AI's Optical Interconnect Transition
InP Substrate: supply/demand, price hike sustainability, key bottleneck

entities.name: AXT, Inc.
entities.role_zh: 上游 — InP 衬底 / 晶圆
entities.note: One of ~3 suppliers that together hold ~70% of global InP substrate output. Disclosed a record ~$60M InP wafer backlog and is on track to double InP capacity by end-2026. Not restricted by export controls on raw indium.
entities.note_zh: 约 3 家合计约占全球 InP 衬底产量 70% 的供应商之一;披露约 6000 万美元 InP 晶圆在手订单纪录,计划 2026 年底前产能翻倍;不受铟原料出口管制限制。

entities.name: Lumentum Holdings
entities.role: Midstream — InP CW laser chips (external light sources for CPO)
entities.role_zh: 中游 — InP CW 激光芯片(CPO 的外部光源)
entities.note: Received a $2B NVIDIA investment + purchase commitment. CEO stated at OFC 2026 that demand is running 25-30% ahead of supply and the gap is widening.
entities.note_zh: 获英伟达 20 亿美元投资 + 采购承诺;CEO 在 OFC 2026 表示需求比供给领先 25-30%,且差距仍在扩大。

entities.name: Coherent Corp.
entities.role: Midstream — InP lasers / photodetectors, CPO integration & packaging
entities.role_zh: 中游 — InP 激光 / 光电探测器,CPO 集成与封装
entities.note: Received a $2B NVIDIA investment + purchase commitment; brings CPO integration and fiber-to-chip packaging expertise.
entities.note_zh: 获英伟达 20 亿美元投资 + 采购承诺;具备 CPO 集成与光纤到芯片封装能力。

entities.name: NVIDIA
entities.role_zh: 需求锚 — 光学路线图(800G/1.6T、CPO)
entities.note: Committed $4B total ($2B each to Lumentum and Coherent) as joint R&D + purchase commitment + future capacity access, explicitly to relieve InP laser fabrication constraints.
entities.note_zh: 累计承诺 40 亿美元(向 Lumentum 与 Coherent 各 20 亿),以联合研发 + 采购承诺 + 未来产能锁定的形式,明确用于缓解 InP 激光产能制约。

claims.text: NVIDIA committed $4B in total ($2B each into Lumentum and Coherent) as joint R&D, purchase commitments and future capacity access, explicitly to tackle limited InP laser fabrication capacity for 800G/1.6T transceivers and CPO engines.
claims.text_zh: 英伟达累计承诺 40 亿美元(向 Lumentum 与 Coherent 各投 20 亿),以联合研发、采购承诺和未来产能锁定的形式,明确用于缓解 800G/1.6T 光模块与 CPO 引擎所需的 InP 激光产能瓶颈。

claims.text: AI capex is projected to reach $527B in 2026, pulling fiber, silicon photonics, 800G/1.6T and CPO from niche hardware into strategic AI infrastructure.
claims.text_zh: 2026 年 AI 资本开支预计达到 5270 亿美元,把光纤、硅光、800G/1.6T 和 CPO 从小众硬件推上 AI 基础设施的战略位置。

claims.text: Current transceiver demand is reported to exceed supply by roughly a factor of two due to InP constraints — a dynamic that mirrors the CoWoS advanced-packaging bottleneck of 2023-2024 that capped NVIDIA's H100 ramp.
claims.text_zh: 受 InP 制约,当前光模块需求据称约为供给的两倍——这一态势与 2023-2024 年制约英伟达 H100 爬坡的 CoWoS 先进封装瓶颈如出一辙。

claims.text: McKinsey's networking-optics work expects 800G transceiver production to run ~40-60% below demand through 2027.
claims.text_zh: 麦肯锡光网络研究预计,800G 光模块产量到 2027 年仍将比需求低约 40-60%。

claims.text: 1.6T transceiver shortages are projected at ~30-40% into 2029.
claims.text_zh: 1.6T 光模块缺口预计到 2029 年仍达约 30-40%。

claims.text: For 3/4-inch InP substrates, 2026 monthly demand is reaching ~700k-800k units while total global monthly supply is only ~400k.
claims.text_zh: 3/4 寸 InP 衬底 2026 年月需求达约 70-80 万片,而全球月供给仅约 40 万片。

claims.text: At OFC 2026 Lumentum's CEO said demand was running 25-30% ahead of supply, with the gap still growing.
claims.text_zh: 在 OFC 2026 上,Lumentum CEO 表示需求比供给领先 25-30%,且差距仍在扩大。

claims.text: A small group of ~3 suppliers (including AXT) together account for roughly 70% of global InP substrate output.
claims.text_zh: 包括 AXT 在内的约 3 家供应商,合计约占全球 InP 衬底产量的 70%。

claims.text: InP substrate is only ~2% of total optical-module cost, so downstream manufacturers are highly price-insensitive and focus on supply-guarantee agreements rather than price.
claims.text_zh: InP 衬底仅占光模块总成本约 2%,下游对价格极不敏感,更看重保供协议而非价格。

claims.text: Suppliers such as AXT have implemented price hikes of nearly 70% for some customers; given InP's irreplaceable physics and high certification barriers, the shortage/price-hike wave looks highly sustainable.
claims.text_zh: AXT 等供应商对部分客户提价近 70%;鉴于 InP 不可替代的物理特性与高认证壁垒,这轮短缺 / 提价具有高度可持续性。

claims.text: AXT disclosed a record ~$60M InP wafer backlog and is on track to double InP capacity by end-2026.
claims.text_zh: AXT 披露了约 6000 万美元的 InP 晶圆在手订单纪录,并计划在 2026 年底前将 InP 产能翻倍。

claims.text: CPO uses high-power CW light sources (300-400mW) with significantly larger die area than standard CW sources; as CPO ramps (expected to take off in 2027) it consumes InP substrate capacity at several times the per-unit rate.
claims.text_zh: CPO 采用高功率 CW 光源(300-400mW),裸片面积明显大于标准 CW 光源;随着 CPO 放量(预计 2027 年起量),单位 InP 衬底消耗量是现在的数倍。

claims.text: Unlike silicon or gallium arsenide, InP offers irreplaceable performance in high-frequency, high-speed, high-optical-power 1310nm/1550nm devices, making it the essential substrate for the copper-to-optical interconnect transition.
claims.text_zh: 与硅或砷化镓不同,InP 在高频、高速、高光功率的 1310nm/1550nm 器件上具有不可替代的性能,是铜互连转向光互连的基础衬底。

claims.text: Silicon can modulate and route light but cannot efficiently generate it; InP generates the laser light that carries data between GPUs, so there is no direct silicon substitute for the light-source function.
claims.text_zh: 硅能调制和路由光,却不能高效产生光;InP 负责产生在 GPU 间传输数据的激光,因此光源这一功能没有直接的硅替代方案。

claims.text: China's concentration of global indium supply introduces a geopolitical risk that U.S.-based manufacturing investment alone cannot fully resolve without diversified upstream sourcing.
claims.text_zh: 中国掌握全球大部分铟供给,带来地缘政治风险,仅靠美国本土制造投资、而不做上游来源多元化,无法完全化解。

claims.text: Because InP is only ~2% of module cost, the same dynamic that grants supply leverage also caps how much absolute margin the substrate layer can ultimately extract before downstream pushes back or redesigns.
claims.text_zh: 正因为 InP 只占模块成本约 2%,赋予其供给杠杆的同一逻辑,也限制了衬底环节在下游反制或重新设计之前能够攫取的绝对利润空间。

claims.text: AXT doubling InP capacity by end-2026 plus the broader 2-to-6-inch wafer transition means that if yields ramp as planned, the shortage thesis could soften faster than bulls expect.
claims.text_zh: AXT 计划 2026 年底前将 InP 产能翻倍,叠加 2 寸向 6 寸的晶圆切换;若良率如期爬坡,短缺逻辑可能比多头预期更快缓解。

claims.text: The CPO demand multiplier is an expectation for 2027, not a realized volume; CPO has repeatedly slipped, so the largest single swing factor in the supply-demand model is also the least certain.
claims.text_zh: CPO 的需求放大效应是对 2027 年的预期,而非已兑现的量;CPO 量产时点屡次推迟,因此供需模型中最大的单一摆动因子也是最不确定的。

claims.text: Analyst view (unsourced): the entire optical-demand curve is downstream of AI capex. If hyperscaler capex disappoints or an AI-capex air-pocket hits, transceiver and InP demand can cut quickly — InP is a high-beta derivative of the AI buildout, not an independent secular story.
claims.text_zh: 分析师观点(无引用):整条光需求曲线都是 AI 资本开支的下游。一旦超大规模厂商资本开支不及预期或出现 AI capex 空窗,光模块与 InP 需求会迅速收缩——InP 是 AI 建设的高 beta 衍生品,而非独立的长期叙事。

monitorables: Quarterly backlog and book-to-bill at AXT / Lumentum / Coherent — the cleanest real-time read on whether the gap is widening or closing.
6-inch InP wafer qualification timelines (capacity ramps started in 2025 reportedly cannot ship qualified product before 2027).
CPO production milestones and any NVIDIA GTC CPO roadmap commentary (CPO is the largest swing factor).
OFC conference demand/supply commentary from optical-component CEOs.
Indium raw-material export-control headlines out of China (upstream geopolitical risk).
monitorables_zh: AXT / Lumentum / Coherent 的季度在手订单与 book-to-bill——判断供需差距扩大还是收窄的最实时指标。
6 寸 InP 晶圆的认证时间表(2025 年启动的扩产据称 2027 年前出不了合格品)。
CPO 量产里程碑,以及英伟达 GTC 上的 CPO 路线图表态(CPO 是最大摆动因子)。
OFC 大会上光器件 CEO 的供需表态。
中国铟原料出口管制相关消息(上游地缘风险)。
